description: CompositionBright lime green round neck T-shirt made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, that has ribbing on the neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine was warmWash separately with like coloursDo not use softenersRemove immediatelyDo not allow to lay on itself when wetDo not bleach, iron Dry cleanableLine dryUpdate your casual style with this round neck T-shirt from nike.
